title: Vermyth semantic recommend HTTP compatibility baseline

baseline_version.description: Bump when corpus or bundled Vermyth manifests change intentionally.

captured_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the live HTTP snapshot was taken.

axiomurgy_git.description: git rev-parse HEAD in Axiomurgy checkout used for the run.

vermyth_git.description: git rev-parse HEAD in Vermyth checkout used for bundled arcane bundles.

healthz.description: Optional GET /healthz response body (status_code + JSON body).

spell_path.description: Path relative to Axiomurgy repo root, forward slashes.

expected_top_bundle_id.description: Null for negative controls or empty-ok spells.

forbidden_top_bundle_ids.description: For negative controls: top-1 must not be any of these.

recommendations_fingerprint.description: Optional sha256 prefix of canonical JSON for recommendations[] slice to detect drift.
